1.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: SAY: "O YOU unbelievers,

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: Proclaim, (O dear prophet Mohammed – peace and blessings be upon him), “O disbelievers!”

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: Say: 'O unbelievers,

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: Say thou: O ye infidels!

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: Say (O Muhammad (Peace be upon him) to these Mushrikun and Kafirun): "O Al-Kafirun (disbelievers in Allah, in His Oneness, in His Angels, in His Books, in His Messengers, in the Day of Resurrection, and in Al-Qadar, etc.)!

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: Say, “O disbelievers.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: Say: “O unbelievers!”

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: Say: "O disbelievers!"

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: Say: O disbelievers!

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: Say, ‘O faithless ones!

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: Say: 'O unbelievers,

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: Say, "O disbelievers,

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: (Muhammad), tell the disbelievers,

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: Say: O unbelievers!

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: Say, "You who deny the Truth,

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: Say: O ye that reject Faith!

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Qul ya ayyuha alkafiroona

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: I do not worship what you worship,

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: Neither do I worship what you worship.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: I serve not what you serve

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: I worship not, that which ye worship.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: "I worship not that which you worship,

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: I do not worship what you worship.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: I do not worship those that you worship

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: "I worship not that which you worship."

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: I worship not that which ye worship;

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: I do not worship what you worship,

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: I do not worship what you worship,

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: I do not worship what you worship.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: "I do not worship what you worship,

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: I do not serve that which you serve,

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: I do not worship what you worship.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: I worship not that which ye worship,

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: La aAAbudu ma taAAbudoona

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: Nor do you worship who I worship,

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: Nor do you worship Whom I worship.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: and you are not serving what I serve,

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: Nor are ye the worshippers of that which I worship.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: "Nor will you worship that which I worship.

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: Nor do you worship what I worship.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: neither do you worship Him Whom I worship;

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: "Nor will you worship whom I worship."

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: Nor worship ye that which I worship.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: nor do you worship what I worship;

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: nor do you worship what I worship.

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: Nor are you worshippers of what I worship.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: nor do you worship what I worship

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: Nor do you serve Him Whom I serve:

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: You do not worship what I worship.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: Nor will ye worship that which I worship.

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Wala antum AAabidoona ma aAAbudu

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: Nor will I worship what you worship,

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: And neither will I ever worship what you worship.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: nor am I serving what you have served,

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: And I shall not be a worshipper of that which ye have worshipped,

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: "And I shall not worship that which you are worshipping.

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: Nor do I serve what you serve.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: nor will I worship those whom you have worshipped;

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: "And I shall not worship that which you are worshipping."

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: And I shall not worship that which ye worship.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: nor will I worship what you have worshipped,

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: Nor am I worshiping what you have worshipped,

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: I have not been worshipping what you worshipped,

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: Nor am I going to serve that which you serve,

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: I will never worship what you worship.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: And I will not worship that which ye have been wont to worship,

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Wala ana AAabidun ma AAabadtum

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: Nor will you worship who I worship:

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: Nor will you worship Whom I worship.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: neither are you serving what I serve

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: Nor will ye be worshippers of that which I worship,

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: "Nor will you worship that which I worship.

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: Nor do you serve what I serve.

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: nor are you going to worship Him Whom I worship.

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: "Nor will you worship that which I worship."

translations.text: Nor will ye worship that which I worship.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: nor will you worship what I worship.

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: neither will you worship what I worship.

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship.

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: nor will you worship what I shall worship.

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: Nor are you going to serve Him Whom I serve:

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: You will never worship what I worship.

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: Nor will ye worship that which I worship.

translations.text: Wala antum AAabidoona ma aAAbudu

translations.author: Ahmed Ali
translations.text: To you your way, to me my way

translations.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
translations.text: For you is your religion, and for me is mine.

translations.author: Arberry
translations.text: To you your religion, and to me my religion!'

translations.author: Daryabadi
translations.text: Yours shall be your requital, and mine shall be my requital.

translations.author: Hilali & Khan
translations.text: "To you be your religion, and to me my religion (Islamic Monotheism)."

translations.author: Itani
translations.text: You have your way, and I have my way.”

translations.author: Maududi
translations.text: To you is your religion, and to me, my religion.

translations.author: Mubarakpuri
translations.text: "To you be your religion, and to me my religion."

translations.author: Pickthall
translations.text: Unto you your religion, and unto me my religion.

translations.author: Qarai
translations.text: To you your religion, and to me my religion.’

translations.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
translations.text: To you your religion, and to me my Religion'

translations.author: Saheeh International
translations.text: For you is your religion, and for me is my religion."

translations.author: Sarwar
translations.text: You follow your religion and I follow mine.

translations.author: Shakir
translations.text: You shall have your religion and I shall have my religion.

translations.author: Wahiduddin Khan
translations.text: You have your religion and I have mine."

translations.author: Yusuf Ali
translations.text: To you be your Way, and to me mine.

translations.author: Transliteration
translations.text: Lakum deenukum waliya deeni
